quests.name: Hold the Line
quests.description: The old fortress still stands — barely. Break the garrison and open the way.
dialogueStart: Teganswall was ours once. Now the dead man its walls.
Clear the guards and raise the inner gate — we need that passage open.
dialogueCompletion: But their commanders still hold the keep. Bring me their seals.

quests.name: Broken Seals
quests.description: Hunt the Death Knights of the Watch and take their seals of office.

objectives.description: Collect 3 Watch Seals from Death Knights

dialogueStart: Three commanders, three seals. Each carries one.
They don't die easy — and their cold cuts deep. Be ready.
dialogueCompletion: Their command is broken. The garrison will scatter now.
But you kicked a hornet's nest. They'll try to retake the breach.

quests.name: The Breach
quests.description: Hold the breach in the wall against the counterattack.
dialogueStart: They're massing at the southern breach. If it falls, the road falls with it.
Stand in the gap. Four assaults — hold every one.
dialogueCompletion: The wall holds. Teganswall is ours again, for the first time in years.
Amuun will want to hear of this. The seals you took bear a symbol he'll recognize.
